raw_consumer_statement: I contested a {$350.00} credit card charge from a local XXXX XXXX for XXXX my XXXX  from the XXXX XXXX of the residence where I had just signed a lease on XX/XX/XXXX. My XXXX  was XXXX  within an hour of my move-in date. I provided Citi with my lease date, pictures of the XXXX XXXX and posted signs, a detailed statement of what happened, and documentation of my conversations with the XXXX  company regarding why my XXXX  was XXXX  as a resident. After 30 days, Citi reversed the charge but also provided a statement from the XXXX  company claiming I was trespassing and that the XXXX  XXXX  requested the removal. Both of these statements are false. I have been living at the residence since XX/XX/XXXX under a signed lease that includes a $ XXXX  monthly XXXX fee. I believe that Citi did not conduct a thorough investigation into my case even after I provided evidence contradicting the XXXX  company 's false claims.
